title: crataegus crenulata
intro: Crataegus crenulata, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China and other parts of East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus crenulata include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart health and digestive issues. Crataegus crenulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
